Night camp, the two seated side by side on a log before a warm campfire, seen from across the fire at a slight angle. The beastfolk woman from the first reference — wolf ears, two-tone russet-brown-and-white hair and fur (white fringe streak, white ear-insides), freckles, solid dark-iron runed slave collar, plain earth-tone camp tunic, wolf tail curled beside her — rests her head on the shoulder of the young man from the second reference — dense dark curly ringlet hair, cloak off his shoulders like a blanket, light leather armor removed, simple undershirt, worn boots.
